result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) function pg_catalog.extract(unknown, text) does not exist
LINE 22:     AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ntc.closeddate) - EXTRACT(EPOCH F...
                 ^
HINT:  No function matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: 
WITH NonTransferredCases AS (
    SELECT
        c.id AS case_id,
        c.ownerid AS agent_id,
        c.createddate,
        c.closeddate
    FROM
        "Case" c
    JOIN
        casehistory__c ch ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE
        ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    GROUP BY
        c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
    HAVING
        COUNT(ch.id) = 1
)
SELECT
    ntc.agent_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ntc.closeddate) - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ntc.createddate)) AS average_handle_time_seconds,
    COUNT(ntc.case_id) AS number_of_cases
FROM
    NonTransferredCases ntc
GROUP BY
    ntc.agent_id
HAVING
    COUNT(ntc.case_id) > 1
ORDER BY
    average_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

WITH NonTransferredCases AS (
    SELECT
        c.id AS case_id,
        c.ownerid AS agent_id,
        c.createddate,
        c.closeddate
    FROM
        "Case" c
    JOIN
        casehistory__c ch ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE
        ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    GROUP BY
        c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
    HAVING
        COUNT(ch.id) = 1
)
SELECT
    ntc.agent_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ntc.closeddate) - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ntc.createddate)) AS average_handle_time_seconds,
    COUNT(ntc.case_id) AS number_of_cases
FROM
    NonTransferredCases ntc
GROUP BY
    ntc.agent_id
HAVING
    COUNT(ntc.case_id) > 1
ORDER BY
    average_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH NonTransferredCases AS (
    SELECT
        c.id AS case_id,
        c.ownerid AS agent_id,
        c.createddate,
        c.closeddate
    FROM
        "Case" c
    JOIN
        casehistory__c ch ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE
        ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    GROUP BY
        c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
    HAVING
        COUNT(ch.id) = 1
)
SELECT
    ntc.agent_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ntc.closeddate::timestamp) - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ntc.createddate::timestamp)) AS average_handle_time_seconds,
    COUNT(ntc.case_id) AS number_of_cases
FROM
    NonTransferredCases ntc
GROUP BY
    ntc.agent_id
HAVING
    COUNT(ntc.case_id) > 1
ORDER BY
    average_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
